info.name: TakePOS API v1 - Full Postman Collection
info.description:
TakePOS API v1 collection generated from the current codebase.

Setup:
1. Import this collection and the matching environment file.
2. Set {{baseUrl}} to your real TakePOS API path, for example: https://your-host.example.com/dolibarr/takepos/api/v1
3. Fill {{login}} and {{password}}.
4. Run 'Auth Login - Issue Token'.
5. Use the remaining requests in order.

Notes:
- All official requests use Bearer {{token}} automatically.
- The login request stores token and basic identifiers into the environment.
- Several requests auto-save ids such as cartId, invoiceId, lineId, heldSaleId, paymentId.

request.description: Authenticate with a TakePOS user login and issue a Bearer token. The token scopes are derived from the logged-in user permissions.
Search products by label, ref, primary barcode, or alias barcode.
Fetch one product by id.
Fetch a product by primary or alias barcode. When exactly one product matches, the API returns the single product object.
List stores visible to the authenticated entity.
Fetch one store by id.
List terminals, optionally filtered by store.
Fetch one terminal by id.
List shifts, typically filtered by terminal and status.
Fetch one shift by id.
List TakePOS carts for the selected terminal.
Create a new TakePOS cart for a terminal and customer.
Fetch one cart by id.
Add one product line to the current cart.
Update a cart line quantity, price, or discount.
Delete one line from the current cart.
Put the current draft cart on hold. Requires an open shift for the cart terminal.
List held sales for the active shift.
Resume one held sale by id.
Validate whether the cart is ready to be converted into an invoice.
Validate the draft cart into an invoice.
Fetch one invoice by id.
List invoices for the selected terminal.
Apply one payment to a validated invoice. Supported methods currently include cash and card.

item.name: Checkout Pay - Validate and Full Pay

request.description: Validate the cart if still draft, then fully pay the invoice in one step.
Cancel and delete a draft cart.
List loyalty accounts if the loyalty feature is enabled for the entity.
Fetch loyalty summary and transactions for one customer.
List refunds, optionally filtered by original invoice.
Fetch one refund by id.
Create a basic refund linked to an invoice.
